body_txt: A scene in which a character has a huge eye staring at them. In many cases, the character won't notice even this — at least not until they turn around and find themselves face-to-eyeball, at which point you can expect a Scare Chord . In the case of an Oculothorax , the eyeball is all there is! Compare with Mirror Scare , Danger Takes a Backseat , and Peek-a-Boo Corpse . There is naturally a lot of overlap with Eye Awaken .
